summary: Halcyon Wealth branding update testing complete. All features verified: navy blue sidebar (#1a2744), gold accents (#D4A84C), Playfair Display serif font on headings, Command Palette with Ctrl+K shortcut, search filtering, keyboard navigation, and 6-section navigation structure.

issues: Console warning: DialogContent requires DialogTitle for accessibility - non-blocking, cosmetic issue
Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - cosmetic issue, charts still render correctly

passed_tests: Gold accent color (#D4A84C) on icons and highlights
Search button with ⌘K hint in sidebar
Command Palette opens via search button click
Command Palette opens via Ctrl+K keyboard shortcut
Command Palette search filtering works (tested 'tax' and 'loan' queries)
Command Palette shows categories: Dashboard, Finances, Planning, Reports, Calculators, Settings
Command Palette keyboard navigation (↑↓ arrows) works
Command Palette Enter key navigates to selected page
Command Palette Escape key closes dialog
Dashboard 'Welcome back' heading with Playfair Display serif font
6-section navigation structure: Dashboard, Finances, Planning, Reports, Calculators, Settings
All navigation links accessible via data-testid attributes
Navigation to /loan-calculator via Command Palette works
critical_code_review_comments: Minor accessibility improvement: Add DialogTitle to CommandPalette component for screen reader support
Branding implementation is complete and consistent across sidebar, headings, and Command Palette
context_for_next_testing_agent: Halcyon Wealth branding verified. Key features: Navy blue sidebar (#1a2744), gold accents (#D4A84C), Playfair Display serif font on headings, Command Palette (Ctrl+K) with search and keyboard navigation. Compliance modal appears on first load - can be dismissed by checking checkbox and clicking 'I Understand & Accept' or bypassed via localStorage.setItem('compliance_accepted', 'true').

command_palette_features.search_filtering: Works - filters by label and category
command_palette_features.keyboard_navigation: ↑↓ arrows to navigate, Enter to select, Escape to close
command_palette_features.selection_highlight: Navy blue background (#1a2744) with gold icon
